mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STORE ( STORE_ID, STORE_NAME, STORE_ADDR, STORE_ADDR2, STORE_PHONE, CATEGORY, STORE_CONTENT, OPERATION_HOURS, CREATE_DATE, RATING, DIBS_COUNT, REVIEW_COUNT, STATUS, BIZ_NO, OWNER_EMAIL, DEPOSIT, USER_ID ) VALUES ( 'STORE' || LPAD(SEQ_STORE_ID.NEXTVAL, 3, '0'), #{storeName}, #{storeAddr}, #{storeAddr2}, #{storePhone}, #{category}, #{storeContent}, #{operationHours}, SYSDATE, 0, 0, 0, '승인대기', #{bizNo}, #{ownerEmail}, #{deposit}, #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT STORE_ID, STORE_NAME, STORE_ADDR, STORE_ADDR2, STORE_PHONE, CATEGORY, STORE_CONTENT, OPERATION_HOURS, CREATE_DATE, RATING, DIBS_COUNT, REVIEW_COUNT, STATUS, BIZ_NO, OWNER_EMAIL, DEPOSIT, USER_ID, STORE_PICTURE FROM STORE WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId}

SELECT STORE_ID, STORE_NAME, STORE_ADDR, STORE_ADDR2, STORE_PHONE, CATEGORY, STORE_CONTENT, OPERATION_HOURS, CREATE_DATE, RATING, DIBS_COUNT, REVIEW_COUNT, STATUS, BIZ_NO, OWNER_EMAIL, DEPOSIT, USER_ID, STORE_PICTURE FROM STORE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS != 'D'
mapper.update: UPDATE STORE SET STORE_NAME = #{storeName}, STORE_ADDR = #{storeAddr}, STORE_ADDR2 = #{storeAddr2}, STORE_PHONE = #{storePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CATEGORY = #{category}, STORE_CONTENT = #{storeContent}, OPERATION_HOURS = #{operationHours}, DEPOSIT = #{deposit} WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.STORE_ID, s.STORE_NAME, s.STORE_ADDR, s.STORE_ADDR2, s.STORE_PHONE, s.CATEGORY, s.STORE_CONTENT, s.OPERATION_HOURS, s.CREATE_DATE, s.RATING, s.DIBS_COUNT, s.REVIEW_COUNT, s.STATUS, s.BIZ_NO, s.OWNER_EMAIL, s.DEPOSIT, s.USER_ID, s.STORE_PICTURE FROM DIDS d JOIN STORE s ON d.STORE_ID = s.STORE_ID WHERE d.USER_ID = #{userId} AND s.STATUS != 'N' ORDER BY s.CREATE_DATE DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE STORE SET DIBS_COUNT = DIBS_COUNT - 1 WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND DIBS_COUNT > 0
mapper.select: SELECT S.STORE_ID, S.STORE_NAME, S.CATEGORY, S.STORE_ADDR, S.RATING, S.STORE_PICTURE AS STORE_PICTURE FROM STORE S INNER JOIN USERS U ON S.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE S.STATUS = '승인' AND U.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM <= 50 ORDER BY S.CREATE_DATE DESC
